preflight.note: Read-only static audit continued without production logic changes.

scanned_files: lottery_api/* (static grep for special fields in scoring/ranking paths)

display_only_or_metrics.finding: special appears in UI badges and notes (display only).
predictedSpecial/actualSpecial are attached to simulation result rows for display/evaluation output.

score_ranking_confidence_paths.finding: numberScores/overallScore/overallConfidence use only result.numbers and result.confidence. No special-field input in score accumulation loops.
evaluation dual-bet numberScores/ranking/confidence derive from numbers+confidence only.

evidence_summary: No static evidence that predicted_special/actual_special/special_hit are used in numberScores aggregation.
No static evidence that special fields affect overall recommendation score, ranking, confidence, or candidate selection in core UI scoring paths.

notes: Special is shown as informational badge/note in display handlers.
No direct static wording found in inspected score paths that claims special improves core recommendation score.

recommended_contracts: Second-zone special must not be included in numberScores aggregation.
Second-zone must remain display-only/informational in recommendation UI.
Second-zone metrics should be reported separately from first-zone score.
Second-zone random baseline 0.125 should be disclosed when presenting special performance.
recommended_next_action: Maintain current score guard and optionally add dedicated contract test to prevent future special-field contamination.
